amendment.description: In the nature of a substitute.

action.text: Cloture invoked in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 89 - 9. Record Vote Number: 50.
Cloture motion on amendment SA 4308 presented in Senate.
Amendment SA 4308 proposed by Senator Scott SC. (consideration: CR S773) In the nature of a substitute.
Roll call votes on amendments in Senate: Cloture invoked in Senate by Yea-Nay Vote. 89 - 9. Record Vote Number: 50.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4308 proposed by Senator Scott SC.
